overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character traversing a snowy, foggy mountain landscape in a sci-fi game. The player navigates rocky outcrops and snow-covered slopes before approaching a crashed spaceship and discovering its occupants in the cockpit.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain pass between rock formations

events.description: turning left to navigate around large rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: carefully walking uphill through narrow passages between snow-covered rock outcrops

entered.detail: large jagged rock face covered in snow and ice with sharp edges
narrow winding path between tall rock formations
steep vertical rock wall with visible ice patches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view navigating through a narrow mountain pass. Large snow-covered rock formations flank both sides as the character ascends the slippery terrain. The fog limits visibility to the immediate rocky surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered mountain ridge with heavy fog

events.description: exiting rocky terrain into open snow field with expansive visibility
crashed spaceship becomes visible through heavy fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the snow-covered ridge in heavy fog and falling snow

entered.detail: expansive white snow landscape with wind-blown patterns and drifts
large dark spacecraft partially buried in snow, barely visible through dense fog

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a wide snow-covered ridge with no visible rock formations. Heavy fog and snowfall reduce visibility as the character continues ascending. In the distance, a large dark shape emerges from the fog, revealing itself to be a crashed spaceship.

events.description: reaching the cockpit and discovering occupants inside the ship

agents.ego_description: approaching the crashed ship and examining the cockpit canopy

notable_agents.action: pilot or occupant visible sitting inside the cockpit canopy wearing dark gear

entered.detail: transparent canopy of the crashed ship showing interior details and occupants
extended wing structure of the crashed spacecraft partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive crashed spaceship, revealing its detailed structure and transparent cockpit canopy. The ship's wing extends to the left, partially buried in snow. Upon reaching the cockpit, a figure becomes visible inside, sitting in the pilot's seat.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent through a claustrophobic mountain pass that gradually opens into a desolate snowy ridge dominated by a crashed spaceship. It begins by navigating narrow, slippery terrain flanked by towering snow-covered rock formations under a thick blanket of fog. As the character climbs, the rocky walls give way to a wide, exposed ridge where heavy snowfall further obscures the horizon until a massive dark silhouette emerges from the mist. The scene then shifts toward this structure, revealing the detailed hull and a snow-buried wing as the camera closes in on the transparent cockpit canopy. Finally, the movement culminates at the glass, bringing a solitary figure seated in the pilot's chair into clear view.
